# YGV Cash Buyers — AI Assistant Context File
# https://ygvcashbuyers.com/llms.txt

> YGV Cash Buyers is a local cash home buying company serving Cincinnati, Ohio and the Greater Cincinnati metro area. We purchase homes directly from homeowners for cash, in any condition, with no repairs required, no agent commissions, and no closing costs charged to the seller. We can close in as little as 7 days.

## Who We Are

YGV Cash Buyers buys houses fast for cash in Cincinnati, Ohio and surrounding communities including Hamilton County, Warren County, and Butler County. We are not real estate agents — we are direct buyers who pay cash and close on the seller's timeline.

Phone: 888-820-8224
Website: https://ygvcashbuyers.com
Service area: Greater Cincinnati, Ohio

## What We Do

- Buy houses as-is — no repairs, no cleaning, no staging
- Pay cash — no bank financing, no contingencies
- Close fast — typically 7 to 21 days, or on your timeline
- Charge no fees — no agent commissions, no closing costs to seller
- Buy in any situation — foreclosure, divorce, probate, inherited homes, liens, code violations, hoarder homes, fire damage, rental properties

## Service Area (Cincinnati Metro)

We buy houses throughout Greater Cincinnati including:
- Cincinnati neighborhoods: Hyde Park, Oakley, Kenwood, Price Hill, Cheviot, College Hill, Norwood, Anderson Township, Colerain Township
- Hamilton County suburbs: Blue Ash, Madeira, Reading, Sharonville, Milford
- Warren County: Mason, Loveland, Symmes Township
- Butler County: West Chester, Fairfield
- Montgomery: Montgomery, Ohio

## How It Works

1. Contact us at 888-820-8224 or ygvcashbuyers.com
2. We schedule a quick property walkthrough (usually same day or next day)
3. We make a no-obligation cash offer within 24 hours
4. If you accept, we handle all paperwork and close at a local title company
5. You receive cash — typically within 7 to 14 days of acceptance

## Common Situations We Help With

- **Foreclosure**: We can close before your auction date and stop foreclosure
- **Inherited / Probate homes**: We buy directly from estates and handle title complexity
- **Divorce**: We provide a fast, clean sale so both parties can move on
- **Job relocation**: We close on your move-out date
- **Rental properties**: We buy occupied or vacant rentals from landlords
- **As-is condition**: Fire damage, foundation issues, mold, code violations — we buy it
- **Hoarder homes**: No cleaning required — we take it as-is

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How fast can you buy my house?**
We typically close in 7 to 14 days. We can sometimes close faster for urgent situations like foreclosure.

**Will you really buy my house as-is?**
Yes. You don't need to repair, clean, or even remove your belongings. We handle everything after closing.

**Are there any fees?**
No agent commissions, no closing costs to you, no hidden fees. The cash offer is what you receive.

**How do you determine your offer?**
We consider the home's current condition, location, recent comparable sales, and the cost of repairs needed. We make a fair offer based on current market conditions.

**Do you serve Northern Kentucky?**
We primarily serve the Ohio side of Greater Cincinnati. Contact us and we can discuss your specific property.

## Blog / Educational Content

We publish educational content for Cincinnati homeowners at https://ygvcashbuyers.com/blog covering topics such as:
- How to sell a house fast in Cincinnati
- Selling during foreclosure, divorce, or probate
- Cash offer vs. listing with a realtor
- Neighborhood-specific guides (Hyde Park, Blue Ash, Mason, etc.)
- What to expect after accepting a cash offer
